title: I Updated /grill-me And Solved Claude Code
summary: Chase AI presented an update to grill-me with a new grill-me-codex skill that verifies Claude Code outputs make sense. The skill builds on the grill-me foundation to solve the problem of validating code generation, not just planning it.
